title: Contact us - chemical substances - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact us - chemical substances
- Substances Management Information Line
- Canada.ca (Chemical Substances) Website inquiries
- Additional information

## Substances Management Information Line
For questions that relate to information gathering (such as: section 71 notices, providing information under section 70, and responding to a Significant New Activity notice), please contact:
- By mail: Substances Management Information Line Chemicals Management Plan Environment and Climate Change Canada Place Vincent Massey, 351 St. Joseph Blvd (6 th floor) Gatineau, QC K1A 0H3
Substances Management Information Line Chemicals Management Plan Environment and Climate Change Canada Place Vincent Massey, 351 St. Joseph Blvd (6 th floor) Gatineau, QC K1A 0H3
- Telephone: 1-800-567-1999 (in Canada) or 819-938-3232
- E-mail: substances@ec.gc.ca
To best answer your questions about chemicals, please select one of the subjects below. Directing your questions to the right area will help avoid delays in responding.
- Consumer Product Safety
- Drugs and Health Products
- Environment and Climate Change Canada
- Environmental and Workplace Health
- First Nations and Inuit Health

## Canada.ca (Chemical Substances) Website inquiries
For questions or comments on the Chemical Substances section of the Canada.ca please contact:
- By mail: Canada.ca (Chemical Substances) Website c/o Health Canada Address locator 4905B Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
Canada.ca (Chemical Substances) Website c/o Health Canada Address locator 4905B Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
- Email: HC.chemicalsubstances-chimiques.SC@canada.ca

## Additional information
To learn more about our commitment to privacy, please follow these links:
- Privacy (Health Canada)
- Environment and Climate Change Canada privacy statement
